query:
SELECT order_id, sales_person, course_name, payment_amount, teacher_fee, transport_fee, created_at 
FROM orders 
WHERE created_at >= '2025-12-20 08:28:00' 
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 5;

mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT order_id, sales_person, course_name, payment_amount, teacher_fee, transport_fee, created_at 
FROM orders 
WHERE created_at >= '2025-12-20 08:28:00' 
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 5;
